source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select 
a.AssociateId, a.FirstName, a.LastName, a.WorkEmail, a.JobTitleDescription, a.IsManagementPosition, 
a.HomeDepartmentDescription, 
a.ReportsToEmail, a.ReportsToLegalFirstName, a.ReportsToLegalLastName, a.BusinessUnitDescription, 
a.Level, a.HireDate, a.YearsofService, a.NewHire, a.PositionEffectiveDate, 
a.Division, a.PayrollCompanyName, 
a.Associate_Id, a.Is_Management_Position, 
a.Reports_To_Associate_ID, a.IsNewManager, 
a.JobStatus, a.TerminationDate, a.SystemStatus , a.[NAICSWorkers'CompCode], 
a.Race, a.Gender, a.HomePhone,
Coalesce(b.No_Of_Direct_Reports,0) as No_Of_Direct_Reports ,
CASE
    WHEN Age < 10 THEN '0-9'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '10-19'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30-39'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 60 AND 69 THEN '60-69'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 70 AND 79 THEN '70-79'
    WHEN Age >= 80 THEN '80+'
END AS Age_Range,
[Leading Teams] as [Leading Teams Graduation Date],[Emerging Leader Program Cohort Certificate] as [ELP Graduation Date],[RLAP] as [RLAP Graduation Date]
from ( 
	Select  T1.EmployeeId as [AssociateID], T1.Firstname as [FirstName],  T1.LastName as [LastName],
	RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [WorkEmail],
	T1.JobTitleDescription as [JobTitleDescription],
	Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [LocationState/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [HomeDepartmentDescription],
	T1.ManagerId as [ReportsToAssociate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ')  as [ReportsToEmail], T2.Firstname as [ReportsToLegalFirstName], T2.LastName as [ReportsToLegalLastName], 
	T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [BusinessUnitDescription], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [HireDate], T1.YearsOfService as [YearsofService],
	case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [NewHire],
	T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [PositionEffectiveDate], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [PayrollCompanyName], 
	T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
	Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
	T1.PositionStatus as [JobStatus] , T1.TerminationDate  as [TerminationDate],
	Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [SystemStatus],
	T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICSWorkers'CompCode],
	T1.Race, T1.Gender, T1.HomePhone,
	
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, NULLIF(T1.birthdate,'1900-01-01'), GETDATE())
	- CASE 
	    WHEN DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T1.birthdate, GETDATE()), T1.birthdate) > GETDATE()
	    THEN 1 
	    ELSE 0 
	  END AS Age
	
	From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
	--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	
	where T1.POsitionStatus='Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'


Union 

	Select  T1.EmployeeId as [AssociateID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [JobTitleDescription], T1.LastName as [LastName], T1.Firstname as [FirstName], 
	RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
	Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [LocationState/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [HomeDepartmentDescription],
	T1.ManagerId as [ReportsToAssociate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ') as [ReportstoEmail], T2.Firstname as [ReportsToLegalFirstName], T2.LastName as [ReportsToLegalLastName], 
	T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [BusinessUnitDescription], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [HireDate], T1.YearsOfService as [YearsofService],
	case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [NewHire],
	T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [PositionEffectiveDate], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [PayrollCompanyName], 
	T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
	Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
	T1.PositionStatus as [JobStatus] , T1.TerminationDate  as [TerminationDate],
	Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [SystemStatus],
	T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICSWorkers'CompCode],
	T1.Race, T1.Gender, T1.HomePhone,
	
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, Nullif(T1.birthdate,'1900-01-01'), GETDATE())
	- CASE 
	    WHEN DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T1.birthdate, GETDATE()), T1.birthdate) > GETDATE()
	    THEN 1 
	    ELSE 0 
	  END AS Age
	From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
	--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	
	where T1.POsitionStatus<>'Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
	And ( T1.HireDate>'2025-07-23' or T1.TerminationDate>'2025-07-30')-- Hardcoded to consider base data as of 31-07

)a Left join 
	(
	Select M.EmployeeID,
	count(distinct E.EmployeeId )As No_Of_Direct_Reports
	from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager M Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee E  on M.EmployeeId=E.ManagerId
	Group by M.EmployeeID
	)b on a.[AssociateID]=EmployeeID

	Left join 
	(
	SELECT * FROM
		( SELECT EmployeeId, CertificationTitle, IssuedOn FROM  EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES ) AS S
		PIVOT
		( Max(IssuedOn) FOR CertificationTitle IN ([Leading Teams],[Emerging Leader Program Cohort Certificate],[RLAP] )) AS P
	) c  on a.[AssociateID]=c.EmployeeID
--where A.[AssociateID]='HCYTCMT4K'

Select 
a.AssociateId, a.FirstName, a.LastName, a.WorkEmail, a.JobTitleDescription, a.IsManagementPosition, 
a.HomeDepartmentDescription, 
a.ReportsToEmail, a.ReportsToLegalFirstName, a.ReportsToLegalLastName, a.BusinessUnitDescription, 
a.Level, a.HireDate, a.YearsofService, a.NewHire, a.PositionEffectiveDate, 
a.Division, a.PayrollCompanyName, 
a.Associate_Id, a.Is_Management_Position, 
a.Reports_To_Associate_ID, a.IsNewManager, 
a.JobStatus, a.TerminationDate, a.SystemStatus , a.[NAICSWorkers'CompCode], 
a.Race, a.Gender, a.HomePhone,
Coalesce(b.No_Of_Direct_Reports,0) as No_Of_Direct_Reports ,
CASE
    WHEN Age < 10 THEN '0-9'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '10-19'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30-39'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 60 AND 69 THEN '60-69'
    WHEN Age BETWEEN 70 AND 79 THEN '70-79'
    WHEN Age >= 80 THEN '80+'
END AS Age_Range,
[Leading Teams] as [Leading Teams Graduation Date],[Emerging Leader Program Cohort Certificate] as [ELP Graduation Date],[RLAP] as [RLAP Graduation Date]
from ( 
	Select  T1.EmployeeId as [AssociateID], T1.Firstname as [FirstName],  T1.LastName as [LastName],
	RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [WorkEmail],
	T1.JobTitleDescription as [JobTitleDescription],
	Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [LocationState/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [HomeDepartmentDescription],
	T1.ManagerId as [ReportsToAssociate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ')  as [ReportsToEmail], T2.Firstname as [ReportsToLegalFirstName], T2.LastName as [ReportsToLegalLastName], 
	T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [BusinessUnitDescription], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [HireDate], T1.YearsOfService as [YearsofService],
	case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [NewHire],
	T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [PositionEffectiveDate], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [PayrollCompanyName], 
	T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
	Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
	T1.PositionStatus as [JobStatus] , T1.TerminationDate  as [TerminationDate],
	Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [SystemStatus],
	T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICSWorkers'CompCode],
	T1.Race, T1.Gender, T1.HomePhone,
	
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, NULLIF(T1.birthdate,'1900-01-01'), GETDATE())
	- CASE 
	    WHEN DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T1.birthdate, GETDATE()), T1.birthdate) > GETDATE()
	    THEN 1 
	    ELSE 0 
	  END AS Age
	
	From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
	--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	
	where T1.POsitionStatus='Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'


Union 

	Select  T1.EmployeeId as [AssociateID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [JobTitleDescription], T1.LastName as [LastName], T1.Firstname as [FirstName], 
	RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
	Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [LocationState/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [HomeDepartmentDescription],
	T1.ManagerId as [ReportsToAssociate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ') as [ReportstoEmail], T2.Firstname as [ReportsToLegalFirstName], T2.LastName as [ReportsToLegalLastName], 
	T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [BusinessUnitDescription], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [HireDate], T1.YearsOfService as [YearsofService],
	case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [NewHire],
	T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [PositionEffectiveDate], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [PayrollCompanyName], 
	T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
	Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
	T1.PositionStatus as [JobStatus] , T1.TerminationDate  as [TerminationDate],
	Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [SystemStatus],
	T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICSWorkers'CompCode],
	T1.Race, T1.Gender, T1.HomePhone,
	
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, Nullif(T1.birthdate,'1900-01-01'), GETDATE())
	- CASE 
	    WHEN DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T1.birthdate, GETDATE()), T1.birthdate) > GETDATE()
	    THEN 1 
	    ELSE 0 
	  END AS Age
	From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
	--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
	
	where T1.POsitionStatus<>'Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
	And ( T1.HireDate>'2025-07-23' or T1.TerminationDate>'2025-07-30')-- Hardcoded to consider base data as of 31-07

)a Left join 
	(
	Select M.EmployeeID,
	count(distinct E.EmployeeId )As No_Of_Direct_Reports
	from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager M Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee E  on M.EmployeeId=E.ManagerId
	Group by M.EmployeeID
	)b on a.[AssociateID]=EmployeeID

	Left join 
	(
	SELECT * FROM
		( SELECT EmployeeId, CertificationTitle, IssuedOn FROM  EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES ) AS S
		PIVOT
		( Max(IssuedOn) FOR CertificationTitle IN ([Leading Teams],[Emerging Leader Program Cohort Certificate],[RLAP] )) AS P
	) c  on a.[AssociateID]=c.EmployeeID
--where A.[AssociateID]='HCYTCMT4K'
